title: cuscuta californica var. californica
intro: Cuscuta californica var. californica, also known as California dodder, is a parasitic plant that grows by attaching itself to other plants and obtaining its nutrients through their vascular system. Traditionally, Cuscuta californica var. californica has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. Cuscuta californica var. californica is often prepared as a tincture or tea, and it may be combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
